Athletics.notes_athlete: Mykolas Alekna (b.2004): 74.35m WL 2024, Olympic silver 2024. Andrius Gudzius (b.1991, 37 in 2028): may still compete. Two-generation pipeline. Alekna is top-3 global favorite for gold.
Athletics.source: World Athletics results 2024; Paris 2024 official results (IOC)

Rowing.notes_athlete: Viktorija Senkute (b.2001): Olympic bronze 2024 (W Single Sculls). Will be 27 in 2028 — peak rowing age. Strong training program.
Rowing.source: Paris 2024 official results; LTU Rowing Federation

Modern Pentathlon.notes_athlete: Laura Asadauskaite (b.1984): 5 Olympic medals but will be 44 in 2028. Virtually certain to have retired. Next-gen: Gintare Venckauskaite — needs to prove senior-level consistency.
Modern Pentathlon.source: UIPM World Ranking 2024; age-based retirement probability

Swimming.notes_athlete: Ruta Meilutyte (b.1997): WR holder 100m breaststroke, Olympic gold 2012. Danas Rapsys (b.1995): European champion, 3 Olympic A-finals. Both capable of medals; neither is a clear favorite.
Swimming.source: FINA World Rankings 2024; Olympic results archive

3x3 Basketball.notes_athlete: Olympic bronze medalists Paris 2024. Core roster: Augustinas Marciulionis, Tomas Dimsa, Paulius Beleckis — avg 27 in 2028. Basketball culture is structural strength.

Canoe Sprint.notes_athlete: 2016 bronze: Lankas/Ramanauskas (K2-200m). No identified 2028 contender. Program active but no pipeline to podium yet confirmed.
Canoe Sprint.source: ICF World Rankings 2024; LTU Canoe Federation

Shooting.notes_athlete: Last medal: Daina Gudzineviciute, Trap Gold 2000. No Lithuanian shooter in current global top-20 identified.

Weightlifting.notes_athlete: Aurimas Didzbalis: bronze 2016, now 35+ in 2028. LTU weightlifting program reduced after IWF sanctions era.
Weightlifting.source: IWF Rankings 2024; CAS doping rulings history

Wrestling.notes_athlete: Mindaugas Mizgaitis: silver 2008. No current top-global contender identified.

Cycling Road.notes_athlete: Diana Ziliste: bronze 2000. No current UCI WorldTour contender from LTU.

Sailing.notes_athlete: Gintare Volungeviciute: silver 2008 Laser Radial. No confirmed contender for 2028 equipment classes.

Boxing.notes_athlete: Evaldas Petrauskas: bronze 2012. Sporadic program. No confirmed 2028 medalist pipeline.

Breaking.notes_athlete: NICKA (Dominyka Banevic): silver 2024. Breaking is NOT on the LA 2028 program. This medal cannot be replicated at LA 2028.
Breaking.source: IOC Program Commission 2023: Breaking removed from LA 2028
